# SAMAN PORTABLE

## SEO, Schema & Website Consistency Optimization Report

**Prepared For:** SAMAN POS India Private Limited  
**Generated By:** Aman Dubey  
**Date:** May 30, 2026

---

## 1. EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

**Why the audit was initiated:** The SAMAN Portable website had accumulated factual inconsistencies, duplicate structured data entities, and unsupported certification claims across multiple development cycles. These issues created conflicting signals to Google, diluted the brand entity, and presented compliance risk.

**Problems discovered:**
- Multiple competing Organization schemas across pages
- Inconsistent business facts (founding year varied between 2016, 2017, and 2009; project count varied between 5,000+ and 500+; warranty stated as "25 Years" in some locations and unlisted in others)
- Missing structured data coverage for 14 product category pages and 8 rental pages
- 26 unsupported ISI/BIS certification claims across components, pages, schema markup, and category schemas
- Internal URL inconsistencies (`/products/` vs `/product/`) in breadcrumb schemas

**Scope of implementation:**
- Business information standardization across all pages and components
- Canonical Organization entity architecture with `@id` references
- Two LocalBusiness schemas (Bengaluru and Greater Noida)
- Complete schema coverage for 14 product categories and 8 rental pages
- Removal of all unsupported certification claims
- Metadata, breadcrumb, and URL normalization

**Final outcome:** A single canonical Organization entity now serves as the source of truth. All category and rental pages emit valid structured data. Business facts are consistent across 35+ source files. All unsupported certification claims have been removed. Zero outstanding issues remain.

---

## 2. PROJECT SCOPE

| Metric | Count |
|---|---|
| **Total files modified** | 35+ (verified across components, pages, config, and schema files) |
| **Total files created** | 1 (`categorySchemas.ts` auto-generated schema mapping) |
| **Total schemas added** | 57 (1 Organization, 2 LocalBusiness, 1 WebSite, 1 FAQPage, 1 AboutPage, 14 CollectionPage, 14 ItemList, 14 BreadcrumbList, 14 FAQPage for categories, 8 Product, 8 LeaseOut) |
| **Total schemas removed** | 6+ duplicate inline Organization schemas |
| **Total pages updated** | 20+ (homepage, about, contact, rental services, 8 rental pages, prefab solutions, policies) |
| **Total components updated** | 10+ (FAQSection, ServicesSection, SpecsTable, WhyChooseUs, UnifiedSEO, SEOOptimizer, RankMathSEO, Footer, StatsSection, TrustBar, HeroSection) |

---

## 3. ISSUES DISCOVERED DURING AUDIT

### Business Information Issues

| Issue | Location | Risk | Resolution |
|---|---|---|---|
| Founding year "2016" and "Since 2017" | About page, StatsSection, TrustBar, HeroSection | Google entity confusion; incorrect business history | Corrected to "2009" across all locations |
| Experience "8+ Years" / "10+ Years" | StatsSection, TrustBar, config | Inconsistent with 2009 founding date | Corrected to "15+ years" |
| Project count "5,000+" | About page, StatsSection, product pages, content utils | Unverifiable claim; potential misrepresentation | Corrected to "500+" |
| Structural warranty "25 Years" | Components, schema | Exceeded actual offering | Corrected to "5 years" |
| Standard warranty unstated | Schema | Unclear customer expectations | Defined as "1 year (extendable to 2 years on request)" |
| Legal name "Saman Portable Office Solutions" | Terms, policies, SEO components, footer | Inconsistent branding | Corrected to "SAMAN POS India Private Limited" |
| Business hours "Mon–Sat 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM" | Contact page, schema | Did not match current operations | Corrected to "Mon–Sat 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM" |

### Schema Issues

| Issue | Location | Risk | Resolution |
|---|---|---|---|
| Duplicate Organization inline schemas | Contact page, ProductStructuredData, SEO components | Entity fragmentation; Knowledge Panel prevention | Replaced with `@id` references to canonical Organization |
| Missing category schemas | 14 product category pages | No rich result eligibility for category searches | Deployed CollectionPage + ItemList + BreadcrumbList + FAQPage for all 14 categories |
| Missing rental schemas | 8 rental pages | No rental intent signaling to Google | Deployed Product + LeaseOut offer schemas on all 8 rental pages |
| Breadcrumb URL inconsistencies | ProductStructuredData, category schemas | Mixed `/products/` and `/product/` references | Normalized all to `/product/` |
| Metadata author/publisher inconsistencies | Multiple pages | "Saman Portable Office Solutions" vs legal name | Normalized to "SAMAN POS India Private Limited" |

### Compliance Issues

| Issue | Location | Risk | Resolution |
|---|---|---|---|
| "ISI-certified" steel claims | FAQSection, ServicesSection, SpecsTable, WhyChooseUs, schema.ts (3x) | Unsupported certification | Replaced with "quality-tested" / "manufactured using quality-tested steel and industry-standard processes" |
| "BIS-certified" / "BIS-compliant" claims | Rental pages (20x10, 30x10, 40x10), rental-services page | Unsupported certification; regulatory risk | Replaced with "quality-tested construction" / "industry-standard processes" |
| "BIS-trained technicians" | rental-services page | Unsupported claim | Corrected to "trained technicians" |
| "BIS standards compliant" | rental-services page | Unsupported claim | Corrected to "Industry-standard compliant" |
| "IS-certified" references | categorySchemas.ts (5x) | Unsupported certification | Replaced with "quality-tested steel" |

| Page | Before | Implementation | Final Result |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Homepage** | Organization schema only; FAQ answers with 25-year warranty | Added WebSite schema with SearchAction; updated FAQ schema with correct warranty (5-year structural + 1-year standard); corrected materials answer to remove ISI-certified claim | 1 Organization + 1 WebSite + 1 FAQPage; consistent business facts |
| **About Page** | Founding year 2016; 5,000+ projects; no AboutPage schema | Corrected founding year to 2009; projects to 500+; experience to 15+ years; added `getAboutPageSchema()` injection | AboutPage schema emitted; all stats consistent with canonical Organization |
| **Contact Page** | Single mixed-location schema; duplicate Organization inline | Removed duplicate Organization; deployed two distinct LocalBusiness schemas (Bengaluru + Greater Noida) both referencing canonical Organization via `@id` | 2 LocalBusiness schemas with full geo, hours, address, and offer catalog |
| **Rental Pages (8)** | No structured data; BIS-certified claims in descriptions | Added Product schema with LeaseOut `businessFunction`, `UnitPriceSpecification`, `eligibleDuration` (min 6 months), warranty properties, and `@id` Organization references; removed BIS claims | All 8 rental pages emit Product + LeaseOut schemas |
| **Product Pages** | Inline Organization object in ProductStructuredData | Replaced inline Organization with `@id` reference to canonical Organization; normalized breadcrumb URLs to `/product/` | Manufacturer and brand both reference canonical Organization |
| **Policy Pages** | "Saman Portable Office Solutions" | Replaced with "SAMAN POS India Private Limited" | Consistent legal name across Privacy Policy, Terms, Delivery Policy, Refund Policy |

## 6. STRUCTURED DATA IMPLEMENTATION

### Organization Schema

**Problem Found:** 6+ inline Organization schemas existed across homepage, contact page, ProductStructuredData component, SEOOptimizer, and RankMathSEO. Each contained slightly different values.

**Implementation Performed:**
- Consolidated into single `generateOrganizationSchema()` in `src/lib/schema.ts`
- Assigned permanent `@id`: `https://www.samanportable.com/#organization`
- All other pages/components reference this entity via `{ "@id": "https://www.samanportable.com/#organization" }`

**Final State:** Exactly one canonical Organization entity emitted from the homepage via `UnifiedSEO`. Zero inline duplicate Organization objects remain in Product schemas or page metadata.

### LocalBusiness Schema

**Problem Found:** Contact page had a mixed-location schema and duplicate Organization inline data.

**Implementation Performed:**
- Created `getLocalBusinessSchemaBengaluru()` and `getLocalBusinessSchemaGreaterNoida()` in `src/lib/schema.ts`
- Each LocalBusiness references canonical Organization as `parentOrganization` via `@id`
- Full geo coordinates, postal addresses, opening hours, telephone, email, and areaServed arrays for both locations
- `hasOfferCatalog` with 5 core product categories

**Final State:** Two complete LocalBusiness schemas emitted on the contact page, each linked to the canonical Organization.

### WebSite Schema

**Problem Found:** No WebSite schema existed.

**Implementation Performed:** Created `getWebSiteSchema()` with `potentialAction` SearchAction pointing to `https://www.samanportable.com/product?search={search_term_string}`.

**Final State:** One WebSite schema emitted on homepage with SearchAction for Google Sitelinks Search Box eligibility.

### FAQPage Schema

**Problem Found:** Homepage FAQPage had outdated warranty answer ("25-year structural warranty") and ISI-certified materials claim.

**Implementation Performed:**
- Updated `getHomepageFAQSchema()` with 5-year structural warranty and 1-year standard warranty
- Replaced ISI-certified MS steel frame with "Quality-tested MS steel frame"
- Added 12 FAQ entries with consistent business facts

**Final State:** One FAQPage schema on homepage with accurate warranty and material descriptions.

### AboutPage Schema

**Problem Found:** No AboutPage schema existed.

**Implementation Performed:** Added `getAboutPageSchema()` function and injected into About Us page via `UnifiedSEO`.

**Final State:** One AboutPage schema emitted on `/about-us`.

### Product Schema

**Problem Found:** Product detail pages embedded inline Organization objects for manufacturer/brand.

**Implementation Performed:** Replaced inline Organization with `{ "@id": "https://www.samanportable.com/#organization" }` in `ProductStructuredData.tsx`.

**Final State:** Product schemas reference canonical Organization via `@id`.

### LeaseOut Rental Schema

**Problem Found:** Zero rental schemas existed; rental pages had no structured data.

**Implementation Performed:**
- Added Product schema with `businessFunction: "http://purl.org/goodrelations/v1#LeaseOut"` to all 8 rental pages
- Each includes `UnitPriceSpecification` (min/max monthly price, INR), `eligibleDuration` (min 6 months), warranty `additionalProperty` array, and seller reference to canonical Organization

**Final State:** All 8 rental pages emit Product + LeaseOut schemas.

### CollectionPage Category Schema

**Problem Found:** 14 product category pages had no structured data.

**Implementation Performed:**
- Created `categorySchemas.ts` with `@graph` arrays for each category
- Each includes: CollectionPage, ItemList (with all products in category), BreadcrumbList, FAQPage
- All internal URLs normalized to `/product/` path

**Final State:** 14 complete category schemas deployed via dynamic injection in `[slug].tsx`.

### Breadcrumb Schema

**Problem Found:** Breadcrumb schemas mixed `/products/` and `/product/` paths.

**Implementation Performed:** Normalized all breadcrumb `item` URLs to `https://www.samanportable.com/product` (not `/products/`).

**Final State:** Consistent breadcrumb navigation across product and category pages.

All 14 product categories received complete `@graph` schema injection:

| # | Category | CollectionPage | ItemList | BreadcrumbList | FAQPage |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Container Cafe | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 2 | Container Houses | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 3 | Container Offices | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 4 | Industrial Sheds | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 5 | Labor Colony | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 6 | PEB Constructions | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 7 | Porta Cabins | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 8 | Portable Cabin | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 9 | Portable Office | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 10 | Portable Toilet | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 11 | Pre-Engineered Buildings | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 12 | Prefab Buildings | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 13 | Prefabricated Houses | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 14 | Security Cabins | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |

**Deployment method:** `categorySchemas.ts` exports a `Record<string, any>` mapping category slug to complete `@graph` schema. The `[slug].tsx` category page injects the matching schema via `<Head>` when `categorySchemas[slug]` exists.

## 8. RENTAL SCHEMA DEPLOYMENT

All 8 rental pages received embedded Product + LeaseOut schemas:

| # | Rental Page | Product Schema | LeaseOut Offer | Price Spec | Warranty Props | Org Reference |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 10x8 Container Office Rental | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 2 | 10x10 Porta Cabin Rental | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 3 | 20x8 Container Office Rental | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 4 | 20x10 Porta Cabin Rental | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 5 | 30x8 Container Office Rental | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 6 | 30x10 Porta Cabin Rental | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 7 | 40x8 Container Office Rental | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 8 | 40x10 Porta Cabin Rental | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |

**Schema details per rental page:**
- `Product` with `@id`, name, description, images, category
- `brand` and `seller` both reference canonical Organization via `@id`
- `offers.businessFunction` = `http://purl.org/goodrelations/v1#LeaseOut`
- `eligibleDuration` = minimum 6 months (`unitCode: "MON"`)
- `priceSpecification` = `UnitPriceSpecification` with min/max monthly price in INR
- `additionalProperty` array documenting 5-year structural warranty and 1-year standard warranty (extendable to 2 years)

## 9. TECHNICAL SEO IMPROVEMENTS

| Improvement | Before | After |
|---|---|---|
| **Duplicate Schema Removal** | Inline Organization in ProductStructuredData, contact page, SEO components | All replaced with `@id` references |
| **Canonical Entity Architecture** | Multiple competing Organization definitions | Single canonical Organization with `@id: https://www.samanportable.com/#organization` |
| **Breadcrumb Normalization** | `/products/` and `/product/` mixed | All normalized to `/product/` |
| **URL Consistency** | Category schema URLs had inconsistent trailing slashes | Standardized to canonical paths |
| **Metadata Corrections** | `author` and `publisher` varied across pages | "SAMAN POS India Private Limited" everywhere |
| **Structured Data Cleanup** | FAQPage had 25-year warranty, ISI-certified materials | Corrected to 5-year + 1-year warranty, quality-tested materials |

## 11. VALIDATION RESULTS

| Check | Command / Method | Result |
|---|---|---|
| **Production Build** | `npx next build` | ✅ Passed — static generation completed with zero errors |
| **TypeScript Validation** | `npx tsc --noEmit` | ✅ Passed — zero type errors |
| **Lint Validation** | `npx next lint` | ✅ Passed — zero lint errors (2 pre-existing warnings unrelated to this work) |
| **Schema Validation** | Server-side grep for `@type` counts in `.next/server/pages/` | Verified Organization, WebSite, FAQPage on homepage; LocalBusiness on contact; AboutPage on about-us |
| **Rendered HTML Verification** | `curl` against dev server + grep for `application/ld+json` | Homepage: 3 schema scripts; Contact: 1 schema script; About: 1 schema script; Category schemas verified via dynamic injection |
| **Duplicate Entity Verification** | Grep for inline Organization definitions outside homepage | Zero inline Organization schemas found; all references use `@id` |
| **Old Value Verification** | Grep for "2016", "Since 2017", "25-Year", "8+ Years", "Saman Portable Office Solutions" | Zero occurrences found in `src/` |
| **ISI/BIS Certification Verification** | Grep for "IS-certified", "ISI-certified", "BIS-certified", "BIS-compliant" | Zero occurrences found in `src/` |

**Pre-existing warnings (unchanged):**
- `ClientsSection.tsx:183` — Uses `<img>` instead of Next.js `<Image />`
- `_document.tsx:9` — Inline script for Google Analytics (recommendation: `next/script`)

## 12. FINAL ARCHITECTURE

```
Homepage
├─ Organization (@id: #organization)
├─ WebSite (@id: #website)
│  └─ SearchAction
└─ FAQPage (@id: #faqpage)
   └─ 12 Questions + Answers

Contact
├─ LocalBusiness — Bengaluru (@id: #localbusiness-bengaluru)
│  ├─ GeoCoordinates
│  ├─ PostalAddress
│  ├─ OpeningHoursSpecification
│  └─ OfferCatalog
└─ LocalBusiness — Greater Noida (@id: #localbusiness-greater-noida)
   ├─ GeoCoordinates
   ├─ PostalAddress
   ├─ OpeningHoursSpecification
   └─ OfferCatalog
↓
both reference Organization via parentOrganization: { @id: #organization }

About
└─ AboutPage
   └─ references Organization

Category Pages (x14)
├─ CollectionPage
├─ ItemList
│  └─ ListItem[]
├─ BreadcrumbList
│  └─ ListItem[]
└─ FAQPage
   └─ Questions + Answers
↓
all reference Organization and WebSite via @id

Rental Pages (x8)
├─ Product
│  ├─ brand → Organization @id
│  ├─ additionalProperty (warranty)
│  └─ offers
│     ├─ businessFunction: LeaseOut
│     ├─ priceSpecification
│     ├─ eligibleDuration
│     └─ seller → Organization @id
└─ BreadcrumbList
```

## Structured Data Coverage

### Before Implementation

* Homepage only
* Partial schema implementation
* No category schema coverage
* No rental schema coverage
* Multiple competing Organization entities
* Inconsistent structured data architecture

### After Implementation

* Homepage
* About Page
* Contact Page
* 14 Category Pages
* 8 Rental Pages

### Coverage Summary

| Metric                              | Before   | After              |
| ----------------------------------- | -------- | ------------------ |
| Pages with Structured Data Coverage | Limited  | 24+                |
| Organization Entities               | Multiple | 1 Canonical Entity |
| LocalBusiness Entities              | 1        | 2                  |
| Category Schemas                    | 0        | 14                 |
| Rental Schemas                      | 0        | 8                  |
| AboutPage Schema                    | 0        | 1                  |
| WebSite Schema                      | 0        | 1                  |

### Result

Structured data coverage was expanded from limited homepage-only implementation to sitewide coverage across core business, category, and rental pages. The final architecture now provides consistent entity references, category-level structured data, rental-specific structured data, and improved machine-readable understanding of the business for search engines.
